description.single: Manage personnel and other operational records for your active worksite.
description.multi: Manage the companies you are responsible for and access their worksites.

companiesList.limitReachedBanner: You have reached the active company / workspace limit. Archive a company or upgrade your plan before adding or restoring one.

confirmArchive.title: Archive “{name}”?
confirmArchive.hint: It will leave the active list.

empty.archiveBannerCompany: Archived companies. You can restore them.
empty.archiveBannerWorksite: Archived worksite records. You can restore them.
empty.deletedBannerCompany: Deleted companies. Permanent deletion cannot be undone.
empty.deletedBannerWorksite: Deleted worksite records. Permanent deletion cannot be undone.
empty.initialDescCompany: Create your first company to get started.
empty.initialDescWorksite: This area fills with your active worksite data. Complete worksite setup to see personnel and other records.

logo.fileTooLarge: File is too large ({sizeMb} MB). Maximum size is 5 MB.
logo.imagesOnly: Only image files can be uploaded (PNG, JPEG, WebP, SVG).

sidebar.title: Worksite sections
sidebar.hint: Choose an area on the left; manage content on the right.

loading.title: Preparing your portfolio
loading.description: We are loading client companies, assignments, and document flows.

header.title: Companies and worksites
header.description: Manage your client companies, per-company workspaces, and personnel flows assigned to them.

activeFirms.label: Active companies
activeFirms.hint: Active client companies tracked in the OSGB panel.

assignedProfessionals.label: Assigned professionals
assignedProfessionals.hint: Total assignments of experts, physicians, and DSP to companies.

totalEmployees.label: Total employees
totalEmployees.hint: Total employee headcount from company records for planning.

overdueWork.label: Overdue work
overdueWork.hint: Open items to watch in assignment and CAPA flows.

focus.title: OSGB-focused surface
focus.p1: This area is only for OSGB owner and admin users. Companies, assignments, contracts, and document tracking are managed in one place.
focus.p2: Assigned staff do not use this panel for their day-to-day flow; they access assigned company workspace data through their own account.
focus.sidebarBody: {firms} active companies, {professionals} assigned professionals, and {overdue} items needing attention are coordinated here.

nova.title: Nova OSGB Manager
nova.subtitle: Management assistant; monitors staff and company performance.
nova.bullet4: Prioritize contract and report renewal risks.

osgbFirms.limitBanner: Active company limit reached. Archive a company or upgrade your plan to add more.

activeSection.title: Active companies
activeSection.description: Manage company, assignment, document, and risk flows per company workspace.
activeSection.searchPlaceholder: Search company, sector, address, or NACE

emptyActive.title: No active companies
emptyActive.description: Client companies linked to the OSGB panel will be listed here.

archivedSection.title: Archived companies
archivedSection.description: Archived companies do not count toward the active limit; risk and document history is kept.

emptyArchived.title: No archived companies
emptyArchived.description: When you archive a company it will appear here.
